_note: Feature for settlement export (CSV). Insight adds a new technical constraint: multi-currency support with ISO 4217 formatting. Expected change map: scope/new constraint yes, ACs changed yes, Edge Cases changed yes.

issue.title: Feature: Settlement CSV export
issue.body:
## Goal
Merchants can export their settlement list as a CSV file for use in accounting software.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Merchants can click "Export CSV" to download all settlements matching the current filter
- [ ] The CSV includes columns: date, reference, description, amount, status
- [ ] Amounts are formatted as decimal numbers (e.g. 1234.56)
- [ ] The export filename includes the date range (e.g. `settlements-2026-01-01-2026-03-31.csv`)
- [ ] Exports of more than 10,000 rows are chunked and delivered as a ZIP archive

## Edge Cases
- Empty result set (no settlements in range) → export a CSV with headers only, no error
- Export triggered while filter is loading → button is disabled until filter resolves
- Network failure during download → browser shows native download error; no partial file is saved

## Domain Events
- `SettlementExportRequested` — emitted when a Merchant triggers a CSV export
- `SettlementExportReady` — emitted when the file is available for download

## Proposed Tasks
- [ ] Add Export CSV button to settlement list UI
- [ ] Implement CSV generation in the settlements service
- [ ] Handle chunked export for large result sets

## Rollout
GA — no feature flag required. Delivered as part of the settlement v2 milestone.

## Bounded Context
Settlement domain. Merchant actor. Reads from `settlements` table; no write side effects.
